notes: Canonical Agent-action workflow: one Agent_Loop action with two tools (an ApiConnection-based weather lookup and an HTTP notify). Models the standard Logic Apps Standard agent shape — Request trigger with a `question` schema → Agent loop with `tools.<name>.actions.*` describing each tool's sub-DAG → Response surfacing LastAssistantMessage. The agentparameters() expression is how tool actions read inputs the model decided to pass. Pair with connections/agent/ or connections/agent-api/.
